name: Magnus
description: No, I blame no one who covets my horn. But to desire more than sight of it is a guarantee of death.

abilities.name: Solid Core
abilities.description: The Solid Core causes knockback sources to be less effective on Magnus and grants him slow resistance bonus. The higher Magnus' level, the greater the slow resistance bonus value.

abilities.name: Empower
abilities.description: Grants the affected attack damage bonus for the duration. Additionally grants cleave damage if the affected allied unit is a melee unit.

abilities.name: Skewer
abilities.description: Rushes forward, damages, and drags all affected enemy heroes along the way. Applies a movement speed slow to affected enemy heroes at the destination. Deals additional damage when Skewering enemy units into trees or cliffs. Increases the max skewer distance.

abilities.name: Horn Toss
abilities.description: Tosses any enemy units in front of Magnus, launching them upward and to his rear. Applies a stun and deals damage to all affected enemy units upon landing.

abilities.name: Reverse Polarity
abilities.description: is innately immune to the offensive teleport component. Other ability effects still apply.
